name: Milio

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Fired Up!
passive.description_source: Innate:  Milio's abilities enchant allied  champions on-contact, causing their next basic attack or ability hit shortly after to apply a  burst and then a short burn to the target enemy, both parts dealing magic damage.

effects.description: Innate: Milio's ability hits on himself and allied champions grant an enchantment for 4 seconds, which causes the next basic attack or ability hit against enemies to deal 7% / 11% / 15% (based on level) of enchanted target's AD bonus magic damage and apply a burn that deals[ 10 : 54.71 (based on level) (+ 20% of Milio's AP) magic damage ][ 1.67 : 9.12 (based on level) (+ 3.33% of Milio's AP) magic damage every 0.25 seconds ]over 1.5 seconds

passive.description: Innate: Milio's ability hits on himself and allied champions grant an enchantment for 4 seconds, which causes the next basic attack or ability hit against enemies to deal 7% / 11% / 15% (based on level) of enchanted target's AD bonus magic damage and apply a burn that deals[ 10 : 54.71 (based on level) (+ 20% of Milio's AP) magic damage ][ 1.67 : 9.12 (based on level) (+ 3.33% of Milio's AP) magic damage every 0.25 seconds ]over 1.5 seconds
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Both the burst and the burn respect enchantment redirection.

basic_ability_1.name: Ultra Mega Fire Kick
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Milio kicks a fireball in the target direction that briefly  knocks back and  stuns the first enemy hit. The ball then bounces once toward the target and explodes, dealing magic damage and  slowing enemies hit.

effects.description: Active: After a 0.25-second delay, Milio kicks a fireball in the target direction that grants sight of its path and knocks back and stuns the first enemy it hits over 1 second.

effects.context_notes: Upon collision, the ball bounces once in the same direction from the target's location, granting sight of the area before exploding in the same radius after a brief delay, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and slowing them for 1.

Upon collision, the ball bounces once in the same direction from the target's location, granting sight of the area before exploding in the same radius after a brief delay, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and slowing them for 1.

effects.description: If the primary target is a non-champion, the ball knocks back further and creates a larger explosion. Ultra Mega Fire Kick refunds 50% of its mana cost if it hits at least one champion with the fireball or explosion.
Milio cannot cast other abilities during Ultra Mega Fire Kick's delay.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: After a 0.25-second delay, Milio kicks a fireball in the target direction that grants sight of its path and knocks back and stuns the first enemy it hits over 1 second.

basic_ability_2.name: Cozy Campfire
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Milio summons a fuemigo that lasts for 6 seconds and follows the closest allied  champion. Allied champions near the fuemigo gain increased  attack range and are continually  healed.

effects.context_notes: Active: Milio summons a fuemigo at the target location or upon the target allied champion for 6 seconds that follows the nearest allied champion and grants sight of its surroundings.
Active: Milio summons a fuemigo at the target location or upon the target allied champion for 6 seconds that follows the nearest allied champion and grants sight of its surroundings.
Active: Milio summons a fuemigo at the target location or upon the target allied champion for 6 seconds that follows the nearest allied champion and grants sight of its surroundings.

effects.description: Cozy Campfire can be recast after 0.5 seconds within the duration.
Recast: Milio commands the fuemigo to follow the target allied champion to within 150-units, placing the recast on a 0.5-second static cooldown.
Milio counts as an allied champion for this ability. Cozy Campfire may grant Fired Up! upon being summoned and at most once every 3 seconds thereafter.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Milio summons a fuemigo at the target location or upon the target allied champion for 6 seconds that follows the nearest allied champion and grants sight of its surroundings. Allied champions near the fuemigo gain bonus attack range equal to a percentage of their base attack range and heal every 0.264 seconds over the duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Cozy Campfire's initial cast and recast have a forgiveness radius of 175 units for their unit-targeted version.

basic_ability_3.name: Warm Hugs
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Milio envelops himself or the target ally in protective flames, granting them a  shield and  bonus move speed for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Milio envelops himself or the target allied champion in protective flames, granting the target a shield and bonus movement speed for 2.
Active: Milio envelops himself or the target allied champion in protective flames, granting the target a shield and bonus movement speed for 2.

effects.description: Milio periodically stocks a Warm Hugs charge, up to a maximum of 2.
Warm Hugs' effects can stack up to 2 times.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Milio envelops himself or the target allied champion in protective flames, granting the target a shield and bonus movement speed for 2.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Warm Hugs has a forgiveness radius of 175 units.

ultimate.name: Breath of Life
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Milio explodes in soothing flames,  healing and  cleansing himself and nearby allied  champions of non- airborne  crowd control and granting them  tenacity for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Milio explodes in soothing flames, healing and cleansing himself and nearby allied champions of non- airborne crowd control, and granting them 65% tenacity for 3 seconds.

effects.description: Milio cannot cast his other abilities for 0.75 seconds after Breath of Life's activation. Breath of Life cannot be used while affected by cast-inhibiting crowd control.

ultimate.description: Active: Milio explodes in soothing flames, healing and cleansing himself and nearby allied champions of non- airborne crowd control, and granting them 65% tenacity for 3 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Breath of Life affects untargetable units.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
